result.summary: The page generally renders, but several elements appear clipped or obscured on the mobile viewport, suggesting horizontal overflow and fixed footer overlap issues.

issues.description: Content is horizontally clipped on the right side. The top category tab shows only part of 'Hot Games', and the third column of game cards is cut off throughout the page.
issues.suggestion: Review responsive layout widths. Use a single/two-column mobile grid or a properly implemented horizontal carousel with clear scroll behavior, and ensure containers do not exceed viewport width.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen, hiding parts of the lower game cards.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding/margin to the main content equal to the fixed nav height so scrollable content is not covered.

issues.description: The hero carousel right arrow is very close to the screen edge and appears partially cramped against the banner boundary.
issues.suggestion: Add safe horizontal padding for carousel controls or position them fully inside the banner area.

issues.description: The top horizontal category navigation shows a partially visible tab without a clear scroll cue, which can look broken rather than intentionally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: If this is a carousel, add scroll affordance or snap alignment; otherwise resize tabs so only complete items are visible on the viewport.
